creator: The Faculty of Horror
description: Andrea and Alex head West to explore the notions of Manifest Destiny and the Frontier Myth in Antonia Bird's  Ravenous . Combining historical context through a modern gaze, Ravenous proves you are who you eat.
subject: Antonia Bird
Ravenous

title: The Faculty of Horror: Episode 70. Man Eater: Ravenous (1999)
